nl_query: Count blocked scripts per block reason category.
failed_sql:
SELECT block_status, block_reason, COUNT(*) AS script_count
FROM   answer_script
WHERE  block_status  = 'MALPRACTICE'
GROUP  BY block_status, block_reason
ORDER  BY script_count DESC;
